channel.title: Frontion Geopolitical News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical headlines from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🦠 WHO Declares Ebola Outbreak in Congo a Global Health Emergency
item.description: A rare Bundibugyo strain of Ebola has killed at least 131 people in eastern Congo, prompting the WHO to declare a public health emergency of international concern as cases spread to Uganda.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Europe Considers Secret Military Alliance to Replace NATO Dependence
item.description: The Economist reports European officials are quietly developing contingency plans for collective defense without US involvement, amid growing concerns about American commitment to the alliance.

item.title: 📈 Global Bond Yields Hit Highest Since 2007 Amid Iran War Inflation Fears
item.description: The 30-year US Treasury yield reached its highest level since before the global financial crisis as investors price in inflation risks from the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Warns of More Strikes on Iran, Says Tehran Wants Deal
item.description: President Trump said he was an hour away from ordering another attack on Iran before postponing it. Tehran denies ongoing talks but Trump claims diplomatic progress.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇱🇻 Russia Warns Latvia Over Ukraine Drone Launches, Threatens Retaliation
item.description: Moscow warned that NATO membership would not protect Baltic states if Ukraine launches drones from their territory. The threat follows a NATO jet shooting down a Ukrainian drone over Estonia.

item.title: 🌍💰 G7 Finance Ministers Call for Action on Global Trade Imbalances
item.description: Finance ministers from G7 nations agreed on the need to address trade imbalances in a fragmented global economy, though concrete measures remain unspecified amid Iran war fallout.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli Minister Threatens West Bank Evictions Over ICC Arrest Warrant
item.description: Hard-line minister Bezalel Smotrich said he would retaliate against Palestinians for the ICC seeking his arrest, threatening to evict residents from a West Bank hamlet.

item.title: 🏛️ NATO Downplays US Troop Withdrawal Fears Under Trump
item.description: NATO's top commander sought to reassure European allies that US troop presence would remain stable despite Trump's history of questioning alliance commitments.

item.title: 🇨🇺 Cuba Warns of 'Bloodbath' if US Attacks Amid New Sanctions
item.description: Cuba's foreign minister warned that any US military action would result in heavy casualties, as Washington imposed new sanctions on the island nation.

item.title: 🦠 Congo Ebola Death Toll Rises Sharply to at Least 131
item.description: The death toll from the Ebola outbreak in eastern Congo has risen dramatically, with health officials reporting at least 131 fatalities as the WHO considers declaring a global health emergency.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Endorses Ken Paxton in Texas Senate Primary
item.description: President Trump endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in his bid to unseat incumbent Senator John Cornyn, supercharging a contentious Republican primary runoff.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Explosions on Iran's Qeshm Island Due to Ammunition Disposal
item.description: Iran confirmed explosions on Qeshm Island were caused by disposing of captured enemy ammunition, not from new attacks. The island sits near the strategic Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🛢️ Four US LNG Vessels Sailing to China After Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Four liquefied natural gas tankers are en route from the United States to China, signaling continued energy trade between the two powers despite ongoing tensions.

item.title: 🇨🇦 Canada's Inflation Surges 2.8% as Iran War Drives Gasoline Costs
item.description: Canada's annual inflation rate jumped to 2.8% in April, driven largely by soaring gasoline prices from the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan's Economy Grows More Than Expected in Q1
item.description: Japan's economy expanded faster than forecasters predicted in the first quarter, defying global headwinds from the Middle East conflict.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Says Drone That Hit Near Nuclear Plant Was Launched From Iraq
item.description: The United Arab Emirates confirmed a drone that struck near its Barakah nuclear power plant originated from Iraq, raising concerns about regional escalation.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinese-Trained Russian Forces Return to Ukraine Front, Sources Say
item.description: About 200 Russian troops who underwent military training in China have returned to fight in Ukraine, according to Reuters sources, signaling deepening military cooperation between Moscow and Beijing.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Taiwan Cautiously Optimistic About US Arms Sales
item.description: Taiwan's defense minister expressed cautious optimism about future US weapons sales, despite President Trump saying he was still considering whether to proceed with new deals.

item.title: ⚔️ Pentagon Signs $500M Deal for Counter-Drone Technology
item.description: The US Defense Department awarded a $500 million contract to Perennial Autonomy for advanced counter-drone systems, reflecting growing investment in drone defense capabilities.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Damages 25 Homes in Kharkiv, Hits Izmail Port
item.description: Russian overnight strikes damaged residential buildings in Kharkiv and hit port facilities near Izmail on the Danube River, Ukrainian officials reported.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Continues Persecution of Crimean Tatars, 82 Years After Deportation
item.description: Eight decades after Stalin's mass deportation of Crimean Tatars, Russia continues to suppress their culture and persecute activists in occupied Crimea.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU to Provide €200 Million to Farmers Hit by Iran War Fertilizer Price Hikes
item.description: The European Union announced plans to disburse €200 million in crisis aid to farmers struggling with fertilizer price spikes caused by the Iran war.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇪🇪 NATO Jet Shoots Down Ukrainian Drone Over Estonia
item.description: A NATO fighter jet shot down a Ukrainian drone that entered Estonian airspace, marking the first such incident as Baltic states grapple with drone incidents in the region.

item.title: 🇺🇦 AP Confirms NATO Jet Downed Ukrainian Drone in Estonia
item.description: A NATO fighter jet shot down a Ukrainian drone over southern Estonia, authorities confirmed. The incident highlights growing tensions over drone flights in Baltic airspace.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Taiwan Says China Is Greatest Source of Regional Instability
item.description: Taiwan's premier said China poses the greatest threat to regional stability due to ongoing military activities near the island, as Beijing conducts exercises around Taiwan.
